title: Phase 2C: Boson AI Client
description: Create boson-client.ts: Higgs Audio Understanding client. OpenAI-compatible chat completions payload with audio_url content parts. Browser-direct with Vite proxy fallback.

title: Create boson-client.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/boson-client.ts. Higgs Audio Understanding client for voice-driven canvas manipulation.

title: Vite proxy fallback on CORS TypeError
description: On fetch TypeError (CORS block), retry with '/api/boson/v1/chat/completions' via Vite dev proxy. Consistent with existing proxy patterns.

title: Auth header for Boson API
description: Set Authorization: Bearer {apiKey} header on all Boson requests. Same pattern as Eigen auth.

title: Construct multimodal content array for Boson messages
description: Build the user message content array for Boson API: content = [...(userText ? [{type:'text',text:userText}] : []), ...audioChunks.map(c => ({type:'audio_url', audio_url:{url:c.dataUrl}}))]. Each audio chunk becomes an audio_url content part with the base64 data URL. This is the OpenAI-compatible multimodal format.

title: Build gate: Boson AI Client
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after boson-client.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) AudioChunk import resolves.

title: Test Boson hackathon endpoint CORS from browser
description:
MANUAL TEST (2 min): Open browser dev console, run:
fetch('https://hackathon.boson.ai/v1/models', {headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer YOUR_KEY'}}).then(r=>console.log('CORS OK', r.status)).catch(e=>console.log('CORS BLOCKED', e))

RESULTS DETERMINE STRATEGY:
- If CORS BLOCKED: Vite proxy is REQUIRED. Update boson-client.ts to use '/api/boson/v1/...' as PRIMARY URL (not fallback). Beads 20d.9 (browser-direct) becomes unnecessary, b3b.9 (Vite proxy) becomes critical.
- If CORS OK: Browser-direct is PRIMARY. Vite proxy is optional fallback. Current bead structure is correct.

Record result as a comment on this bead so downstream workers know which path to implement.

title: Implement BosonAUError class
description: Custom error class extending Error with optional status code. name='BosonAUError'. Used for audio understanding error handling.

title: Define BosonAudioRequest interface
description: interface BosonAudioRequest { audioChunks: AudioChunk[]; systemPrompt: string; userText?: string; model?: string }. audioChunks from audio-chunker.ts.

title: Implement audioUnderstand function
description: Implement audioUnderstand function with CORS fallback: 1) Build OpenAI-compatible payload (messages, model, stop, extra_body), 2) Try POST to BOSON_BASE_URL='https://hackathon.boson.ai/v1/chat/completions', 3) On TypeError (CORS block), retry with PROXY_URL='/api/boson/v1/chat/completions' via Vite dev proxy, 4) On 5xx with v3.5 model, retry once with v3 fallback model, 5) Parse response.choices[0].message.content, 6) Return raw text (may contain <tool_call> tags). 30s AbortController timeout.
design: CORS fallback detection: a TypeError from fetch() indicates a network/CORS error (as opposed to an HTTP error which gives a Response object). On TypeError, construct the same request but with URL = '/api/boson/v1/chat/completions' (Vite proxy rewrites this). The proxy config in vite.config.ts handles the rewrite. In production, a different proxy solution would be needed.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Builds valid OpenAI chat/completions payload
2. Audio chunks sent as audio_url content parts
3. Tries direct URL first, falls back to /api/boson proxy on TypeError
4. On 5xx with v3.5, retries once with v3 model
5. Returns raw response text string
6. Throws BosonAUError with status code on unrecoverable failure
7. 30s AbortController timeout
8. Stop sequences included in request body

title: Build OpenAI-compatible messages payload
description: messages[0]={role:'system', content:systemPrompt}, messages[1]={role:'user', content:[...text parts, ...audio_url parts]}. Audio chunks as {type:'audio_url', audio_url:{url:dataUrl}}.

title: Configure STOP_SEQUENCES
description: const STOP_SEQUENCES = ['<|eot_id|>', '<|endoftext|>', '<|audio_eos|>', '<|im_end|>']. Required for Higgs model to properly terminate responses.

title: Configure EXTRA_BODY for skip_special_tokens
description: const EXTRA_BODY = { skip_special_tokens: false }. Spread into request body per Boson API requirements.

title: Model v3.5 primary with v3 fallback
description: Primary: 'higgs-audio-understanding-v3.5-Hackathon'. Fallback: 'higgs-audio-understanding-v3-Hackathon'. On primary failure (5xx), retry once with fallback.

title: Browser-direct URL attempt
description: First attempt: fetch('https://hackathon.boson.ai/v1/chat/completions'). If CORS headers are permissive, this works with zero infrastructure.

title: Phase 2H: Voice Command Actions
description: Create voice-command-actions.ts: full pipeline orchestration — record → chunk → understand → execute tool → TTS confirmation. Integration point for all Phase 2 components.

title: Create voice-command-actions.ts module
description: Create new file src/store/voice-command-actions.ts. Full pipeline orchestration for voice commands on canvas nodes.
design: This module uses module-level state (let recorder: BufferedPCMRecorder | null = null) to track the active recorder instance. This is intentional — the recorder lifecycle spans multiple function calls (startVoiceCommand → stopAndProcessVoiceCommand). Import stores via .getState() pattern (not hooks — this is not a React component).

title: Call audioUnderstand with chunks + prompt
description: Call audioUnderstand({ audioChunks, systemPrompt }, bosonApiKey). Handle BosonAUError with user-facing error message.

title: Parse and execute tool call from response
description: Call executeToolCall(responseText, targetNodeId). Store result via setResult(). On failure, setError().

title: Non-blocking TTS confirmation via Eigen
description: After successful tool execution, fire-and-forget TTS of result.message via eigenTts + audioPlayback.play(). Don't block on TTS failure.

title: Build gate: Voice Command Actions
description: Run 'npm run build', 'npm run lint', and 'npm run test' after voice-command-actions.ts is complete. Main integration point — all cross-module imports must resolve. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) test exits 0 (no regressions).

title: Implement startVoiceCommand(nodeId)
description: Create BufferedPCMRecorder, call start(). Update voice-command-store: startRecording(nodeId). Store recorder in module-level variable.

title: Implement stopAndProcessVoiceCommand pipeline
description: Full pipeline: 1) recorder.stop() → Float32Array PCM buffer, 2) recorder.destroy(), 3) store.setProcessing(true), 4) chunkPcmBuffer(buffer, 16000) → ChunkResult, 5) guard: chunks.length===0 → 'No speech detected', 6) guard: durationSec < 0.5 → 'Try speaking longer', 7) get nodes/edges from useSemanticStore.getState(), topic from useSessionStore.getState().session?.topic, 8) buildVoiceSystemPrompt(nodeId, nodes, edges, topic), 9) const bosonKey = resolveBosonApiKey(settings), 10) await audioUnderstand({audioChunks, systemPrompt}, bosonKey), 11) await executeToolCall(responseText, targetNodeId), 12) store.setResult(result), 13) fire-and-forget: eigenTts(result.message, eigenKey).then(blob => audioPlayback.play(blob)).catch(() => {}).
acceptance_criteria:
1. Stops recording and gets Float32Array buffer
2. Destroys recorder to free resources
3. Sets store to processing state
4. Rejects audio < 0.5s with user-friendly message
5. Rejects empty chunks with user-friendly message
6. Builds system prompt with correct node context
7. Calls audioUnderstand with chunks and prompt
8. Executes parsed tool call against store
9. Stores result in voice-command-store
10. Fires TTS confirmation (non-blocking, catch errors silently)
11. On any error: sets store error state, never leaves in processing state

title: Implement cancelVoiceCommand cleanup
description: Destroy recorder if active, clear voice-command-store. Called on pointer leave (drag off mic button).

title: Create BufferedPCMRecorder on command start
description: Instantiate new BufferedPCMRecorder(), await start(). Handle getUserMedia permission denial with clear error.

title: Chunk audio via chunkPcmBuffer(buffer, 16000)
description: After stop(), call chunkPcmBuffer(pcmFloat32, 16000) to split recording into <=4s WAV base64 chunks for Boson API.

title: Guard: duration < 0.5s rejection
description: If chunkResult.durationSec < 0.5, reject with 'Try speaking longer' feedback. Prevents expensive API calls for accidental taps.

title: Guard: empty chunks rejection
description: If chunkResult.chunks.length === 0, reject with 'No speech detected'. Edge case when recording produces no data.

title: Build system prompt via buildVoiceSystemPrompt
description: Get nodes/edges from useSemanticStore, topic from useSessionStore. Call buildVoiceSystemPrompt(nodeId, nodes, edges, topic).

title: Phase 2B: BufferedPCMRecorder
description: CAN START IMMEDIATELY — no Phase 1 dependency. Add BufferedPCMRecorder class to media-recorder.ts. Accumulates PCM chunks into a single buffer (vs streaming). Reuses existing pcm-processor.js AudioWorklet.

title: Create BufferedPCMRecorder class
description: Add BufferedPCMRecorder class after existing PCMRecorder in src/services/voice/media-recorder.ts (~line 91). Accumulates PCM vs streaming.
design: Add BufferedPCMRecorder class AFTER the existing VoiceRecorder class (which ends at line 155). The file has 3 sections: 1) utility functions (lines 1-29), 2) PCMRecorder class (lines 35-91), 3) VoiceRecorder class (lines 93-155). Add BufferedPCMRecorder as section 4 at line ~157. Reuse the same AudioWorklet loading pattern from PCMRecorder.start() (lines 47-65).

title: AudioContext + AudioWorklet setup at 16kHz
description: Same setup as existing PCMRecorder: create AudioContext(sampleRate: 16000), load pcm-processor.js worklet, connect MediaStream source.

title: Chunk accumulation into Int16Array[]
description: On AudioWorklet message, push Int16Array chunk to this.chunks array. Accumulates all audio until stop() is called.

title: stop() concatenate to Float32Array
description: On stop(): calculate total sample count across all Int16 chunks. Allocate single Float32Array. Copy each Int16 chunk, converting back to Float32 (divide by 0x7FFF). Return complete Float32 buffer. NOTE: The pcm-processor.js worklet outputs Int16, but chunkPcmBuffer() expects Float32 input. This Int16→Float32→Int16 round-trip is intentional to keep chunkPcmBuffer() format-agnostic — the efficiency cost is negligible for short voice commands.

title: getElapsedMs() method
description: Return Date.now() - this.startedAt. Used for duration checks and UI elapsed time display.

title: destroy() cleanup method
description: Disconnect worklet node, close AudioContext, stop MediaStream tracks, clear chunks array. Prevent memory leaks.

title: Verify pcm-processor.js worklet reuse
description: Verify public/pcm-processor.js (24 lines) works with BufferedPCMRecorder. The worklet receives Float32 inputs, converts to Int16 PCM with proper scaling (negative: *0x8000, positive: *0x7fff), and posts raw ArrayBuffer back to main thread. BufferedPCMRecorder should handle the port.onmessage the same way as PCMRecorder (line 58-61 of media-recorder.ts), but push to an internal array instead of converting to base64 and invoking a callback.

title: Ensure 16kHz sample rate consistency with chunkPcmBuffer
description: BufferedPCMRecorder MUST create AudioContext with sampleRate: 16000 (matching PCMRecorder at media-recorder.ts line 52). The chunkPcmBuffer function is called with sampleRate=16000 in voice-command-actions.ts. If these don't match, chunk boundaries and WAV headers will be wrong.

title: Build gate: BufferedPCMRecorder
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after BufferedPCMRecorder added to media-recorder.ts. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) class exports alongside PCMRecorder and VoiceRecorder.

title: Phase 2E: Tool Executor
description: Create tool-executor.ts: parse <tool_call> JSON from Boson response, dispatch to existing store actions (branchFromNode, promoteNode, addUserTurn+generateDialogueResponse).

title: Create tool-executor.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/tool-executor.ts. Parses tool_call JSON from Boson response, dispatches to existing store actions.

title: Build gate: Tool Executor
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after tool-executor.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) store action imports resolve.

title: Define ToolCallResult interface
description: interface ToolCallResult { toolName: string; success: boolean; message: string }. message is TTS-friendly confirmation text.

title: Parse tool_call XML tags from response
description: Extract JSON from <tool_call>{"name":"...","arguments":{...}}</tool_call> in Boson response text. Use regex or string parsing.
design: Boson models output tool calls in XML format: <tool_call>{"name": "branch_exploration", "arguments": {"path_type": "challenge", "question": "..."}}</tool_call>. Use regex: /<tool_call>(.*?)<\/tool_call>/s to extract. The 's' flag makes . match newlines. JSON.parse the captured group. If no match, return the full response text as a voice_response message.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Extracts JSON between <tool_call> and </tool_call> tags
2. Parses JSON to get name and arguments fields
3. Handles whitespace/newlines around tags
4. Returns null (not throw) when no tag found
5. Throws on malformed JSON inside valid tags
6. Handles case where response has text before/after the tag

title: Map branch_exploration to branchFromNode
description: On tool name 'branch_exploration': await branchFromNode(nodeId, pathType) from src/store/actions.ts. IMPORTANT: branchFromNode is async (returns Promise<void>) — must be awaited. Also pass arguments.question as context if branchFromNode accepts it, or set it on the created node after. Return TTS-friendly confirmation: 'Created {pathType} branch'.

title: Map promote_insight to promoteNode
description: On tool name 'promote_insight': call promoteNode(nodeId, reason, note) from src/store/promotion-actions.ts. NOTE: promoteNode() is synchronous and returns a Promotion object (with id, sessionId, nodeId, reason, note, createdAt). The return value can be used for the confirmation message. Return: 'Node promoted as {reason}'.

title: Map start_dialogue to dialogue actions
description: On tool name 'start_dialogue': first call addUserTurn(nodeId, opening, mode) from src/store/dialogue-actions.ts (synchronous, returns DialogueTurn). Then await generateDialogueResponse(nodeId, mode) (async, returns Promise<DialogueTurn>). Both functions require mode as DialecticMode type. If opening is not provided in arguments, use a default like 'Let us explore this further.' Return: 'Started {mode} dialogue'.

title: Map voice_response to TTS message
description: On tool name 'voice_response': no store action. Return arguments.message for TTS playback.

title: Fallback: no tool_call tag → voice_response
description: If no <tool_call> tag found in response, treat entire response text as a voice_response message. Graceful degradation.

title: Validate tool arguments against expected types
description: Basic validation: check required fields exist, enum values are valid. Throw descriptive error on invalid arguments.

title: Foundation: Settings Infrastructure
description: Initialize API key settings, env var support, and Vite proxy config for both Eigen AI and Boson AI providers.

title: Add eigenApiKey to AppSettingsSchema
description: Add eigenApiKey: z.string().default('') to AppSettingsSchema in src/persistence/settings-store.ts (around line 20, after openaiApiKey). Zod default ensures old persisted settings migrate silently. IMPORTANT: plan-talk-actions.ts at lines 171 and 216 already references settings.eigenApiKey — adding this field to the schema will resolve the existing TypeScript type error.
design: Insert after openaiApiKey (line ~19). Follow exact pattern: eigenApiKey: z.string().default(''). The .default('') is critical — without it, loading old persisted settings that lack this field will fail Zod validation and crash the app.

title: Add VITE_EIGEN_API_KEY env var documentation
description: Document VITE_EIGEN_API_KEY in .env.example or equivalent. Allows Eigen API key via environment variable as fallback to settings UI.
close_reason: Already exists in .env.example: VITE_EIGEN_API_KEY is already defined.

title: Add VITE_BOSON_API_KEY env var documentation
description: Document VITE_BOSON_API_KEY in .env.example or equivalent. Allows Boson API key via environment variable as fallback to settings UI.
close_reason: Already exists in .env.example: VITE_BOSON_API_KEY is already defined.

title: Build gate: Settings Infrastructure
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after all settings changes. Must pass with zero errors. Strict mode ON. Verify eigenApiKey/bosonApiKey recognized by TypeScript. AC: (1) npm run build exits 0, (2) npm run lint exits 0, (3) No eigenApiKey type errors in plan-talk-actions.ts.

title: Create resolveEigenApiKey helper
description: Add resolveEigenApiKey(settings: AppSettings): string helper to settings-store.ts. Returns settings.eigenApiKey || (import.meta.env?.VITE_EIGEN_API_KEY as string) ?? ''. NOTE: This is a standalone helper, not part of the existing resolveApiKeys() function — resolveApiKeys() is for LLM provider keys (ProviderId-based) while this handles voice service keys. Place near the existing resolveApiKeys function for discoverability.
design: Do NOT add to the existing resolveApiKeys/SETTINGS_KEY_MAP/ENV_KEY_MAP system — those are typed around ProviderId ('mistral'|'gemini'|'anthropic'|'openai') and adding Eigen would require changing that type. Keep this as a simple standalone function. Place after resolveApiKeys (~line 97).

title: Add bosonApiKey to AppSettingsSchema
description: Add bosonApiKey: z.string().default('') to AppSettingsSchema in src/persistence/settings-store.ts. Same Zod default pattern as eigenApiKey.

title: Create resolveBosonApiKey helper
description: Add resolveBosonApiKey(settings: AppSettings): string helper to settings-store.ts. Returns settings.bosonApiKey || (import.meta.env?.VITE_BOSON_API_KEY as string) ?? ''. Standalone helper alongside resolveEigenApiKey — not part of existing resolveApiKeys() provider system.

title: Add Eigen AI ApiKeyField to Settings/ApiTab.tsx
description: Add ApiKeyField component for 'Eigen AI' in ApiTab.tsx. Follow existing reusable pattern (ApiKeyFieldProps at lines 55-64). Bind to eigenApiKey setting. Validation: status='valid' when length >= 20, 'not-set' when empty, 'invalid' otherwise. NOTE: Eigen is NOT a ProviderId, so you cannot use hasEnvFallback(). Instead manually check !!import.meta.env.VITE_EIGEN_API_KEY for the showEnvFallback prop. Place in a new 'Voice Services' fieldset below existing LLM provider keys.

title: Add Boson AI ApiKeyField to Settings/ApiTab.tsx
description: Add ApiKeyField for 'Boson AI (Audio Understanding)' in ApiTab.tsx. Help text: 'Used for voice commands on the exploration canvas.' Validation: status='valid' when length >= 20, 'not-set' when empty, 'invalid' otherwise. Manually check !!import.meta.env.VITE_BOSON_API_KEY for showEnvFallback. Place in same 'Voice Services' fieldset as Eigen key.

title: Update voiceTtsVoiceId placeholder text
description: Change voiceTtsVoiceId field placeholder to 'Linda (default)' in ApiTab.tsx, reflecting the Eigen AI Higgs Audio TTS default voice.

title: Add voice provider help text to settings
description: UPDATE existing help text at lines 194-196 of ApiTab.tsx. Current text says 'Eigen and Boson API key fields will be added with the voice integration.' Remove future-tense wording since the key fields are now being added. Keep 'Voice powered by Eigen AI (Higgs Audio)' prefix.

title: Add Vite dev-proxy for Boson AI
description: Add proxy config to vite.config.ts: '/api/boson' → target 'https://hackathon.boson.ai', changeOrigin: true, rewrite path. Consistent with existing proxy patterns.
design: Add the '/api/boson' proxy entry inside the existing server.proxy block in vite.config.ts (alongside '/ws/pty' and '/health' entries). Use: '/api/boson': { target: 'https://hackathon.boson.ai', changeOrigin: true, rewrite: (path) => path.replace(/^\/api\/boson/, '') }. The rewrite strips the /api/boson prefix so /api/boson/v1/chat/completions hits hackathon.boson.ai/v1/chat/completions.

title: Verification & Testing
description: Manual verification checklist for Phase 1 (Eigen Voice) and Phase 2 (Voice Canvas). Covers happy paths, error cases, and regression checks.

title: Phase 1 verify: Set Eigen API key in Settings
description: Manual test: Open Settings → API tab → enter valid Eigen AI API key → save. Verify key persists across page reload.

title: Phase 2 verify: Voice dialogue
description: Manual test: Hold mic → speak 'Let's debate this further' → release. Verify dialogue panel opens in appropriate dialectic mode.

title: Phase 2 verify: TTS confirmation plays
description: Manual test: After each voice command action, verify TTS plays confirmation message (e.g., 'Created challenge branch', 'Node promoted').

title: Error verify: No API key → mic disabled
description: Manual test: Remove Boson API key from settings. Verify mic button in radial menu is disabled with tooltip.

title: Error verify: Short audio rejection
description: Manual test: Tap mic button very briefly (<0.5s). Verify 'Try speaking longer' feedback appears instead of API call.

title: Error verify: API error → red flash + toast
description: Manual test: Use invalid API key. Verify red flash on mic button and error toast notification. Menu stays open.

title: Phase 1 verify: Record voice → ASR transcript
description: Manual test: Open PlanTalk → hold mic → speak → release. Verify ASR returns correct transcript in the input field.

title: Phase 1 verify: AI response generates TTS
description: Manual test: After ASR transcript submitted, verify AI response triggers TTS via Eigen endpoint. Audio should play automatically if autoplay enabled.

title: Phase 1 verify: WAV audio plays correctly
description: Manual test: Verify WAV blob from Eigen TTS plays correctly through AudioPlayback.play(). Check audio quality and timing.

title: Phase 1 verify: Typed input still works
description: Regression test: Verify typed text input in PlanTalk still works as before. Voice additions must not break existing text flow.

title: Phase 2 verify: Set Boson API key
description: Manual test: Open Settings → API tab → enter Boson AI API key → save. Verify key persists and mic button becomes enabled.

title: Phase 2 verify: Radial menu shows center mic
description: Manual test: Create session, explore until resolved node. Right-click → verify radial menu shows center mic button with proper styling.

title: Phase 2 verify: Voice branch creation
description: Manual test: Hold mic → speak 'Challenge the assumption about market size' → release. Verify new Challenge branch appears with AI-generated question.

title: Phase 2 verify: Voice promotion
description: Manual test: Hold mic → speak 'This is a great insight, promote it' → release. Verify node gets promoted with appropriate reason.

title: Phase 2A: Audio Chunker
description: CAN START IMMEDIATELY — no Phase 1 dependency. Pure algorithm module. Create audio-chunker.ts: time-based 4-second PCM chunking with WAV encoding. No VAD, no ONNX dependency. Outputs base64 data URLs with sequential mime types per Boson spec.

title: Create audio-chunker.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/audio-chunker.ts. Time-based PCM audio chunking with WAV encoding for Boson API.

title: Build gate: Audio Chunker
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after audio-chunker.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0.

title: Define AudioChunk interface
description: interface AudioChunk { index: number; dataUrl: string } — dataUrl format: 'data:audio/wav_N;base64,...' with sequential mime types per Boson spec.

title: Define ChunkResult interface
description: interface ChunkResult { chunks: AudioChunk[]; durationSec: number; numChunks: number } — returned by chunkPcmBuffer.

title: Implement writeWavHeader helper
description: Write 44-byte RIFF WAV header into a DataView. Fields: RIFF magic, file size, WAVE format, fmt subchunk (PCM, mono, sampleRate, 16-bit), data subchunk header.
design: Standard 44-byte RIFF WAV header layout: bytes 0-3 'RIFF', 4-7 file size - 8, 8-11 'WAVE', 12-15 'fmt ', 16-19 subchunk1 size (16), 20-21 audio format (1=PCM), 22-23 channels (1=mono), 24-27 sample rate, 28-31 byte rate, 32-33 block align (2), 34-35 bits per sample (16), 36-39 'data', 40-43 data size. Use DataView for byte-level writes. All values are little-endian.

title: Implement encodeWavChunk helper
description: Encode Int16Array PCM data with WAV header to base64 data URL. Uses btoa() for base64. Sequential mime type: 'audio/wav_N' where N is chunk index.

title: Implement chunkPcmBuffer main function
description: Split Float32Array into <=4s segments (4*sampleRate samples each). Convert Float32→Int16 PCM. Prepend WAV header. Base64-encode each chunk.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Input: Float32Array + sampleRate number
2. Splits into segments of exactly 4*sampleRate samples
3. Last chunk may be shorter than 4s
4. Each chunk has sequential mime type: audio/wav_0, audio/wav_1, etc.
5. Output data URLs are valid base64
6. WAV headers are 44 bytes, mono, 16-bit PCM
7. Returns ChunkResult with chunks array, durationSec, numChunks
8. Empty input returns { chunks: [], durationSec: 0, numChunks: 0 }

title: Float32 to Int16 PCM conversion
description: Convert Float32Array samples (range -1.0 to 1.0) to Int16Array (range -32768 to 32767). Clamp values, multiply by 0x7FFF.

title: Time-based 4-second splitting logic
description: Split PCM buffer into segments of exactly 4*sampleRate samples. Last chunk may be shorter. No silence detection — pure time-based split.

title: Base64 encoding with sequential mime types
description: Each chunk gets data URL 'data:audio/wav_N;base64,...' where N is 0-indexed chunk number. This sequential mime type format is required by Boson API spec.

title: Phase 1E: VoicePane Re-enablement
description: Re-enable the mic button in VoicePane.tsx (currently disabled with 'Voice coming soon'). Wire VoiceRecorder blob capture to transcribeAndAnalyze with Eigen ASR.

title: Load eigenApiKey from settings in VoicePane
description: In VoicePane.tsx, add imports for settings: import { loadSettings, resolveEigenApiKey } from '../../persistence/settings-store'. Currently the component only imports from plan-talk-store, plan-talk-actions, audio-playback, telemetry, and styles. Load eigenApiKey via resolveEigenApiKey(await loadSettings()) — or use a React effect to load on mount.

title: Re-enable mic button in VoicePane
description: Remove the disabled state and 'Voice coming soon' text from mic button. Enable when eigenApiKey is present.

title: Wire VoiceRecorder blob to transcribeAndAnalyze
description: Import VoiceRecorder from media-recorder.ts: import { VoiceRecorder } from '../../services/voice/media-recorder'. This class is NOT currently imported in VoicePane.tsx. Create a VoiceRecorder instance, call start() on record begin, stop() returns a Promise<Blob>. Pass that blob to transcribeAndAnalyze(blob, eigenApiKey). Also import transcribeAndAnalyze from '../../store/plan-talk-actions' (already imported in the file).
acceptance_criteria:
1. VoiceRecorder imported from ../../services/voice/media-recorder
2. Instance created on record start, destroyed on stop/cancel
3. stop() returns Promise<Blob> which is passed to transcribeAndAnalyze
4. eigenApiKey loaded from settings before recording starts
5. Missing API key prevents recording start with user feedback
6. Recording state reflected in UI (isBusy check)

title: Implement hold-to-talk mode in VoicePane
description: When voiceInputMode='hold': onPointerDown starts recording, onPointerUp stops and submits. Natural push-to-talk interaction.

title: Implement toggle mode in VoicePane
description: When voiceInputMode='toggle': click to start recording, click again to stop and submit. Alternative to hold-to-talk.

title: Show recording state UI feedback in VoicePane
description: Visual feedback during recording: pulsing indicator, elapsed time, clear 'recording' state. Match existing UI patterns.

title: Import transcribeAndAnalyze in VoicePane for voice flow
description: Verify that transcribeAndAnalyze is already imported from plan-talk-actions (it is — line 3 of VoicePane.tsx). Also verify analyzeReflection import exists (line 3). No new imports needed for the analysis pipeline — only VoiceRecorder (see kfn.3) and settings (see kfn.1) need adding.

title: Build gate: VoicePane
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after VoicePane.tsx changes. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) new imports resolve.

title: Phase 2D: Canvas Tool Definitions
description: CAN START IMMEDIATELY — no Phase 1 dependency. Pure data/schema definitions. Create canvas-tools.ts: tool schemas for branch_exploration, promote_insight, start_dialogue, voice_response. Uses real enum values from codebase types.

title: Create canvas-tools.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/canvas-tools.ts. Tool definitions for voice-driven canvas actions.

title: Build gate: Canvas Tool Definitions
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after canvas-tools.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0.

title: Define branch_exploration tool schema
description: Function tool: name='branch_exploration', params: path_type (enum from PathType: clarify|go-deeper|challenge|apply|connect|surprise), question (string, required).

title: Define promote_insight tool schema
description: Function tool: name='promote_insight', params: reason (enum from PromotionReason: insightful_reframe|actionable_detail|risk_identification|assumption_challenge|cross_domain_link), note (optional string).

title: Define start_dialogue tool schema
description: Function tool: name='start_dialogue', params: mode (enum from DialecticMode: socratic|devil_advocate|steelman|collaborative), opening (optional string).

title: Define voice_response tool schema
description: Function tool: name='voice_response', params: message (string, required). Fallback when no canvas action is appropriate — just speak back.

title: Reference PathType values for branch_exploration tool
description: Import PathType type from src/core/types/primitives.ts. NOTE: This is a Zod-inferred type alias (z.infer<typeof PathTypeSchema>), NOT a TypeScript enum. For the tool schema, hardcode the string values: ['clarify', 'go-deeper', 'challenge', 'apply', 'connect', 'surprise']. Optionally import PathTypeSchema and extract .options for DRY enum values.

title: Reference PromotionReason values for promote_insight tool
description: Import PromotionReason type from src/core/types/promotion.ts. NOTE: This is a Zod-inferred type alias, NOT a TypeScript enum. For the tool schema, hardcode the string values: ['insightful_reframe', 'actionable_detail', 'risk_identification', 'assumption_challenge', 'cross_domain_link']. Optionally import PromotionReasonSchema and extract .options.

title: Reference DialecticMode values for start_dialogue tool
description: Import DialecticMode type from src/core/types/dialogue.ts. NOTE: This is a Zod-inferred type alias, NOT a TypeScript enum. For the tool schema, hardcode the string values: ['socratic', 'devil_advocate', 'steelman', 'collaborative']. Optionally import DialecticModeSchema and extract .options.

title: Implement formatToolsForPrompt XML builder
description: Export function formatToolsForPrompt(): string. Wraps CANVAS_TOOLS array in <tools>...</tools> XML block, JSON-stringifying each tool definition.

title: Phase 1D: PlanTalk Eigen Integration
description: Replace placeholder stubs in plan-talk-actions.ts with real Eigen AI imports. Wire transcribeAndAnalyze and generateTts to use eigenApiKey from settings.

title: Delete local stubs, import Eigen client in plan-talk-actions.ts
description: DELETE the two local stub functions at lines 11-16 of plan-talk-actions.ts (transcribeAudio and textToSpeech that throw 'not yet implemented' errors). Replace with import: import { transcribeAudio, EigenSTTError, textToSpeech } from '../services/voice/eigen-client'. These are module-private stubs, NOT external imports — they must be fully removed and replaced with real Eigen client imports.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Local transcribeAudio stub at lines 11-13 is DELETED
2. Local textToSpeech stub at lines 14-16 is DELETED
3. New import added: import { transcribeAudio, EigenSTTError, textToSpeech } from '../services/voice/eigen-client'
4. All existing call sites still compile (signatures match)
5. No other references to the stub functions remain

title: Build gate: PlanTalk Integration
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after plan-talk-actions.ts stub replacement. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) no references to old stub functions.

title: Verify existing plan-talk and VoicePane code assumptions
description:
Combined verification checklist (no code changes needed):

1. analyzeReflection() at lines 171 and 216 of plan-talk-actions.ts already checks 'settings.voiceTtsEnabled && settings.eigenApiKey' — confirm these guards are correct after eigenApiKey is added to schema (b3b.1)

2. The TTS guard 'if (settings.voiceTtsEnabled && settings.eigenApiKey)' exists at both TTS call sites — no additional guard needed

3. plan-talk-store has setTtsTurnStatus(turnId, status) and setTtsBlob(turnId, blob) methods — confirm they exist and accept correct types (called by generateTts at lines 339-345)

4. VoicePane.tsx already imports transcribeAndAnalyze and analyzeReflection from plan-talk-actions (line 3) — no new analysis pipeline imports needed, only VoiceRecorder (kfn.3) and settings (kfn.1)

Run 'npm run build' to confirm all types resolve after eigenApiKey is in the schema.

title: Replace STT stub with transcribeAudio
description: After replacing stubs (see n9t.1), verify transcribeAndAnalyze() at line 250 now calls the REAL transcribeAudio(audioBlob, apiKey) from eigen-client.ts. No signature change needed — the local stub already matches: (blob: Blob, apiKey: string) => Promise<string>.

title: Replace TTS stub with textToSpeech
description: After replacing stubs (see n9t.1), verify generateTts() at line 341 now calls the REAL textToSpeech(text, apiKey, voiceId) from eigen-client.ts. Stub signature matches: (text: string, apiKey: string, voiceId?: string) => Promise<Blob>. Existing audioPlayback.play(blob) at line 348 handles WAV natively — no change needed there.

title: Verify analyzeReflection eigenApiKey guards (already in code)
description: VERIFY existing code: analyzeReflection() at lines 171 and 216 ALREADY checks 'settings.voiceTtsEnabled && settings.eigenApiKey' before calling generateTts. This code currently references a field not yet in the schema — completing b3b.1 (adding eigenApiKey to AppSettingsSchema) will resolve the TypeScript error. No code change needed in this file for TTS gating.

title: Update error handling for EigenSTTError
description: Update the catch block in transcribeAndAnalyze() at lines 254-259. Current error handling uses generic Error check. Change to: const message = err instanceof EigenSTTError ? err.message : 'Transcription failed. Please try again.' — EigenSTTError is already imported via n9t.1.

title: Verify TTS eigenApiKey guard (already in code)
description: VERIFY ONLY — the guard 'if (settings.voiceTtsEnabled && settings.eigenApiKey)' already exists at lines 171 and 216 of plan-talk-actions.ts. No code change needed here. This bead confirms the guard is correct after eigenApiKey is added to the settings schema (b3b.1).

title: Pass voiceTtsVoiceId to TTS calls
description: Thread settings.voiceTtsVoiceId through to textToSpeech() calls so user can override the default 'Linda' voice.

title: Verify WebSocket STT path (transcribeRealtimeAndAnalyze) unchanged
description: VERIFY ONLY: transcribeRealtimeAndAnalyze() at lines 231-240 uses WebSocket-based STT and feeds text directly to analyzeReflection(). This path is unrelated to Eigen integration and must NOT be modified. Confirm it still works after stub replacement.

title: Verify plan-talk-store TTS state methods exist
description: VERIFY: plan-talk-store must have setTtsTurnStatus(turnId, status) and setTtsBlob(turnId, blob) methods — these are called by generateTts() at lines 339-345. Confirm these exist and accept the correct types. They should already be implemented since the TTS stub path exercises them.

title: Error Handling & Resilience
description: Comprehensive error handling across the voice pipeline: mic permission, ASR/TTS timeouts, CORS fallback, rate limits, short audio rejection, missing API keys, settings migration.

title: Mic permission denied handling
description: On getUserMedia rejection: show inline mic-denied state. Typed input stays available. No auto-retry. Clear error message explaining how to grant permission.

title: Toast notification system for voice errors
description: Ensure error states surface as toast notifications to user. Use existing toast/notification system. Don't silently swallow errors.

title: Eigen ASR timeout (30s) recovery
description: On fetch timeout or non-2xx from Eigen ASR: show 'Transcription failed, try again' toast. Reset turn state to error. No auto-retry.

title: Eigen TTS failure (15s) recovery
description: On TTS fetch timeout or autoplay block: text stays visible, TTS chip shows 'failed'. Never block plan output on TTS failure.

title: Boson CORS blocked detection and fallback
description: On fetch TypeError (CORS block): show 'Audio Understanding unavailable' toast, then fall back to Vite proxy path '/api/boson/v1/...'.

title: Boson invalid response handling
description: If no <tool_call> tag in response: treat entire response as verbal reply via voice_response tool. Graceful fallback, not an error.

title: Boson rate limit / 5xx handling
description: On HTTP 429/5xx: show 'Audio Understanding busy, try again' toast. Retry once with v3 fallback model before failing.

title: Audio too short (<0.5s) rejection
description: Duration check before API call: if < 0.5s, show 'Try speaking longer' feedback. Reject before expensive API call.

title: No Boson API key → mic button disabled
description: Check for Boson API key in settings. If missing, mic button disabled with tooltip 'Set Boson AI API key in Settings'. Prevents confusing errors.

title: Old persisted settings migration via Zod defaults
description: New settings fields use z.string().default(''). When parsing old persisted settings without eigenApiKey/bosonApiKey, Zod silently adds defaults. Zero user action needed.

title: Phase 1A: Eigen AI Client
description: Create eigen-client.ts with EigenSTTError, EigenTTSError, transcribeAudio (ASR V3.0), and textToSpeech (TTS V2.5) functions. Browser-direct calls to https://api-web.eigenai.com/api/v1/generate.

title: Create eigen-client.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/eigen-client.ts. Module for Eigen AI Higgs Audio ASR V3.0 and TTS V2.5 browser-direct API calls.
design: Directory src/services/voice/ already exists with media-recorder.ts and audio-playback.ts. Create eigen-client.ts alongside them. Export all public symbols (EigenSTTError, EigenTTSError, transcribeAudio, textToSpeech, DEFAULT_VOICE). No default exports — match project convention of named exports.

title: Default voice Linda configuration
description: Export const DEFAULT_VOICE = 'Linda'. Used when voiceId parameter is undefined. Alternatives include 'Jack' etc.

title: FormData construction for ASR endpoint
description: Build multipart/form-data with model, file (Blob with filename 'recording.webm'), and language fields. Standard browser FormData API — zero npm deps.

title: FormData construction for TTS endpoint
description: Build multipart/form-data with model, text, voice, stream, and sampling fields. Sampling is JSON-stringified object with temperature, top_p, top_k.

title: Build gate: Eigen AI Client
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after eigen-client.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) all exports used and typed.

title: Implement EigenSTTError class
description: Custom error class extending Error with optional status code. name='EigenSTTError'. Used for ASR-specific error handling in plan-talk-actions.ts.

title: Implement EigenTTSError class
description: Custom error class extending Error with optional status code. name='EigenTTSError'. Used for TTS-specific error handling.

title: Implement transcribeAudio function
description: POST to https://api-web.eigenai.com/api/v1/generate. Build FormData with: model='higgs_asr_3', file=new File([audioBlob], 'recording.webm', {type: audioBlob.type}), language='English'. Headers: Authorization: Bearer apiKey (do NOT set Content-Type — browser sets multipart boundary automatically). Parse response JSON, return response.text field. Wrap in 30s AbortController timeout (see tvy.5).
design: Do NOT set Content-Type header manually — the browser must set the multipart boundary automatically when using FormData. Use new File([audioBlob], 'recording.webm', {type: audioBlob.type}) to give the blob a filename, since some APIs require it. The response JSON shape is { text: string }.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Function exports from eigen-client.ts
2. FormData has exactly 3 fields: model, file, language
3. Authorization header uses Bearer token pattern
4. 30s timeout via AbortController
5. Returns string (extracted from response JSON .text field)
6. Throws EigenSTTError on non-2xx responses
7. 401 maps to 'Invalid Eigen AI API key'
8. 429 maps to rate limit message
9. No new npm dependencies (uses native fetch + FormData)

title: Add 30s AbortController timeout for ASR
description: Wrap transcribeAudio fetch in 30-second AbortController timeout. On abort, throw EigenSTTError('Transcription timed out').

title: Handle 401 auth error in transcribeAudio
description: Map HTTP 401 response to EigenSTTError('Invalid Eigen AI API key'). Gives user actionable error message.

title: Handle 429 rate limit in transcribeAudio
description: Map HTTP 429 response to EigenSTTError with rate limit message. No auto-retry — surface to user.

title: Implement textToSpeech function
description: POST to https://api-web.eigenai.com/api/v1/generate. Build FormData with: model='higgs2p5', text=text, voice=voiceId||'Linda', stream='false', sampling=JSON.stringify({temperature:0.85,top_p:0.95,top_k:50}). Headers: Authorization: Bearer apiKey. Return response.blob() — this is WAV audio that audioPlayback.play() handles natively. Wrap in 15s AbortController timeout (see tvy.9).
acceptance_criteria:
1. Function exports from eigen-client.ts
2. FormData has exactly 5 fields: model, text, voice, stream, sampling
3. Default voice is 'Linda' when voiceId not provided
4. Returns Blob (WAV audio)
5. 15s timeout via AbortController
6. Throws EigenTTSError on failure
7. WAV blob plays correctly via audioPlayback.play()

title: Add 15s timeout for TTS
description: Wrap textToSpeech fetch in 15-second AbortController timeout. TTS should be faster than ASR. On abort, throw EigenTTSError.

title: Phase 2K-M: Radial Menu Voice Integration
description: Add center microphone button to RadialMenu (press-and-hold UX). Add voiceState to radial-menu-store. CSS animations for recording/processing/success/error states.

title: Add voiceState to radial-menu-store
description: CAN START IMMEDIATELY — no Phase 1 dependency. Add voiceState: 'idle' | 'recording' | 'processing' | 'success' | 'error' to RadialMenuState interface in radial-menu-store.ts. Add setVoiceState action. Current interface has: isOpen, position, targetNodeId, targetFsmState, open(), close(). Add voiceState with default 'idle' and setVoiceState setter. Also reset voiceState to 'idle' in close() action.

title: Accessibility: aria-label for mic button
description: aria-label='Hold to speak a voice command' on mic button. Screen reader accessible.

title: Mic button idle CSS styles
description: In RadialMenu.module.css: .micButton { position:absolute, border-radius:50%, bg:var(--card-bg), border:2px solid var(--accent-primary), z-index:1, flex center, transition }.

title: Mic button hover effect
description: .micButton:hover:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(1.1) }. Subtle scale-up on hover for affordance.

title: Recording state CSS: red ring + pulse
description: .micRecording { border-color: #d94f4f; animation: micPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite }. Red ring with expanding shadow pulse.

title: Processing state CSS: spinner overlay
description: .micProcessing { opacity: 0.7; cursor: wait }. Visual indication that voice command is being processed.

title: @keyframes micPulse animation
description: @keyframes micPulse { 0%,100%: box-shadow 0 0 0 0 rgba(217,79,79,0.4); 50%: box-shadow 0 0 0 8px rgba(217,79,79,0) }. Expanding red ring effect.

title: Success state: green flash + auto-close
description: On voiceState='success': green flash on mic button, then auto-close radial menu after 500ms timeout.

title: Error state: red flash + toast
description: On voiceState='error': red flash on mic button, show toast notification with error message. Menu stays open.

title: Guard mic button on resolved node FSM state
description: Only show/enable the center mic button when targetFsmState === 'resolved'. The radial menu opens for all node states, but voice commands only make sense on resolved nodes (which have answers). Check useRadialMenuStore targetFsmState. If not resolved, hide mic button or show it disabled with tooltip 'Voice commands available on resolved nodes only'.

title: Build gate: Radial Menu Voice
description: Run 'npm run build', 'npm run lint', and 'npm run test' after RadialMenu.tsx and CSS changes. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) test exits 0, (4) CSS module classes match JSX.

title: Import voice command store in RadialMenu
description: Import useVoiceCommandStore in RadialMenu.tsx. Subscribe to isRecording, isProcessing for UI state.

title: Import voice command actions in RadialMenu
description: Import { startVoiceCommand, stopAndProcessVoiceCommand, cancelVoiceCommand } from voice-command-actions.

title: Add center mic button JSX
description: Add center mic button at position (0,0) of the radial menu. Positioning math: style={{ left: -BUTTON_RADIUS, top: -BUTTON_RADIUS, width: BUTTON_SIZE, height: BUTTON_SIZE }} where BUTTON_RADIUS=22, BUTTON_SIZE=44 (constants already defined in RadialMenu.tsx lines 8-9). The button sits at the origin point of the container, which is centered on the right-click position. Use className micButton from RadialMenu.module.css.
design: The 6 existing PATHS buttons are positioned in a ring at radius 80px. The center mic button goes at (0,0) — the exact center of the ring. Existing buttons use angles [270, 330, 30, 90, 150, 210] degrees. The center is naturally empty, making it a good place for the mic button. The z-index should be 1 (higher than the ring buttons, which have no explicit z-index) so the mic sits on top.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Button renders at visual center of radial menu
2. Positioned with left: -22, top: -22, width: 44, height: 44 (using constants)
3. Has microphone icon (emoji or SVG)
4. Disabled when no Boson key or during processing
5. onPointerDown starts recording, onPointerUp stops
6. onPointerLeave cancels recording
7. aria-label present for accessibility
8. Visual state changes for idle/recording/processing

title: Implement press-and-hold onPointerDown
description: onPointerDown: if not disabled and hasBosonKey and targetNodeId, call startVoiceCommand(targetNodeId). Begin recording on press.

title: Implement onPointerUp stop-and-process
description: onPointerUp: if isVoiceRecording, call stopAndProcessVoiceCommand(). Release stops recording and triggers processing.

title: Implement onPointerLeave cancel
description: onPointerLeave: if isVoiceRecording, call cancelVoiceCommand(). Dragging off the button cancels recording.

title: Disabled state when no Boson API key
description: Compute hasBosonKey by loading settings: const settings = await loadSettings(); const hasBosonKey = !!resolveBosonApiKey(settings). Mic button disabled={isDisabled || !hasBosonKey || isVoiceProcessing}. Show tooltip 'Set Boson AI API key in Settings' when disabled due to missing key. Need to import loadSettings and resolveBosonApiKey from settings-store.ts.

title: Disabled state during processing
description: While isVoiceProcessing is true, disable mic button and show spinner overlay. Prevents double-submission.

title: Phase 2G: Voice Command Store
description: CAN START IMMEDIATELY — no Phase 1 dependency. Pure Zustand store. Create voice-command-store.ts: Zustand store for voice command state (isRecording, isProcessing, targetNodeId, lastResult, error).

title: Create voice-command-store.ts module
description: Create new file src/store/voice-command-store.ts. Zustand store for voice command state.

title: Define VoiceCommandState interface
description: Interface with: isRecording, isProcessing (booleans), targetNodeId (string|null), lastResult ({toolName,success,message}|null), error (string|null).

title: Implement Zustand store with create()
description: export const useVoiceCommandStore = create<VoiceCommandState>()((set) => ({...})). Standard Zustand pattern matching project conventions.

title: Implement recording state actions
description: startRecording(nodeId): set isRecording=true, targetNodeId, clear error/lastResult. stopRecording(): set isRecording=false.

title: Implement processing and result actions
description: setProcessing(bool), setResult(result): sets lastResult + isProcessing=false, setError(error): sets error + isProcessing=false, clear(): reset all to initial.

title: Build gate: Voice Command Store
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after voice-command-store.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0.

title: Future Work & Out of Scope
description: Tracked items explicitly deferred: Silero VAD, PlanTalk Audio Understanding mode, Canvas Voice Notes, DialoguePanel voice, Python sidecar.

title: Silero VAD integration
description: Replace time-based 4s chunking with Silero VAD for intelligent speech boundary detection. Adds ~5MB ONNX dependency. Only if audio quality demands it.

title: PlanTalk Audio Understanding mode
description: Add Boson Audio Understanding as alternative to Eigen ASR in PlanTalk modal. Deferred until Phase 2 proves Boson quality.

title: Canvas Voice Notes feature
description: Attach voice notes to canvas nodes. Separate feature from voice commands — not needed for demo.

title: DialoguePanel voice integration
description: Add voice input/output to DialoguePanel for spoken dialectic conversations. Out of scope for initial delivery.

title: Python sidecar alternative
description: Optional Python backend for production CORS handling. Currently handled by Vite proxy. Only needed if deploying beyond dev.

title: Phase 2F: Voice Prompt Builder
description: Create voice-prompt.ts: build system prompt for Boson Audio Understanding with node context (via compileContext), session topic, and tool definitions.

title: Create voice-prompt.ts module
description: Create new file src/services/voice/voice-prompt.ts. Builds system prompt for Boson Audio Understanding.

title: Build gate: Voice Prompt Builder
description: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' after voice-prompt.ts is complete. AC: (1) build exits 0, (2) lint exits 0, (3) compileContext and formatToolsForPrompt imports resolve.

title: Import compileContext from context-compiler
description: Import { compileContext } from '../../core/graph/context-compiler'. Reuse existing graph context compilation for node ancestry/siblings.

title: Import formatToolsForPrompt
description: Import { formatToolsForPrompt } from './canvas-tools'. Provides <tools>...</tools> XML block for system prompt.

title: Build system prompt role description
description: Build system prompt with role description. Get target node from allNodes.find(n => n.id === targetNodeId). Include: node.question, node.answer?.summary (answer is optional — guard with ?.), node.depth, node.fsmState. SemanticNode has these exact fields per src/core/types/node.ts.

title: Include node context in prompt
description: Include current node details: Question, Answer summary, Depth level. Fetched from SemanticNode by nodeId.

title: Include session topic in prompt
description: Include session topic in prompt. IMPORTANT: The session store does NOT have a top-level 'topic' field. Access via useSessionStore.getState().session?.topic ?? 'Unknown topic'. The topic lives inside the PlanningSession object, not directly on the store state.

title: Include compiled graph context
description: Call compileContext(nodeId, nodes, edges) and include .formatted output. Gives model awareness of surrounding graph structure.

title: Include tool definitions XML block
description: Append formatToolsForPrompt() output at end of system prompt. Model sees available tools and selects ONE based on user speech.

title: Tool selection guidance in prompt
description: Add guidance: 'Explore further → branch_exploration, Mark important → promote_insight, Discuss/debate → start_dialogue, None of the above → voice_response'.
